# Git Error Handling Test
# Tests error scenarios and security restrictions

# Build the git server binary
go build -o mcp-git-server .

# Create a test git repository
mkdir test_git_repo
cd test_git_repo
git init
git config user.name "Test User"
git config user.email "test@example.com"
echo "# Test Repo" > README.md
git add README.md
git commit -m "Initial commit"

# Test error handling scenarios
exec ../mcp-git-server . <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"roots":{"listChanged":true},"sampling":{}}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"git_status","arguments":{"repository":"../nonexistent"}},"id":3}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"git_status","arguments":{"repository":"/etc"}},"id":4}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"git_status","arguments":{}},"id":5}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"git_add","arguments":{"repository":".","files":["nonexistent.txt"]}},"id":6}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"git_commit","arguments":{"repository":"."}},"id":7}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"git_create_branch","arguments":{"repository":".","branch":"main"}},"id":8}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"git_switch_branch","arguments":{"repository":".","branch":"nonexistent-branch"}},"id":9}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"invalid_tool","arguments":{}},"id":10}
EOF

# Verify access denied errors
stdout 'access denied.*repository outside allowed repositories'

# Verify missing argument errors
stdout 'missing required argument.*repository'
stdout 'missing required argument.*message'

# Verify git command failures
stdout 'git command failed'

# Verify branch already exists error
stdout 'git command failed.*already exists'

# Verify nonexistent branch error
stdout 'git command failed'

# Verify tool not found error
stdout '"error"'
stdout 'method not found'

# Cleanup
cd ..
rm -rf test_git_repo

# Test starting server without arguments (should fail)
! exec ./mcp-git-server

# Test with non-git directory (should fail)
mkdir not_git_repo
! exec ./mcp-git-server not_git_repo
rm -rf not_git_repo

# Test with nonexistent directory (should fail)
! exec ./mcp-git-server /nonexistent/directory
